queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the risk-mitigating impact of having no checking account on consumer credit default probability.
Determinants of default: empirical analysis of how extended loan duration in months correlates with reduced credit risk and lower default rates.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Credit risk drivers: empirical analysis of the risk-reducing effect of maintaining a negative checking account balance on loan default probability.
